name: /promote-standard invokes the codebase-impact preview helper before any rule is created
command:
mkdir -p standards/snapshots tree && printf 'sections:
  5.2.4: x
' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml && printf 'eval(s)
' > tree/x.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-standard.sh" owasp-asvs 5.2.4 --snapshot standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml --root tree --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'codebase_impact_preview=invoked' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
